description: Create a two-column content slide on Europe lagging in structural reform, with a horizontal stacked bar chart of Draghi report implementation by sector on the left and bullet lists of key initiatives and comments on the right.

header.headline: Europe’s more interventionist approach to economic security, but poor implementation track record, could increase operating complexities for firms without a competitiveness payoff
header.sub: Europe lags in structural reform amidst pivot to strengthen economic security

left.title: Implementation of Draghi report recommendations, by sector (% of initiatives)

items.text: Europe is pivoting toward a more interventionist economic security model across strategic sectors.
Implementation of Draghi report recommendations varies widely by sector, with many initiatives still in progress rather than completed.
Poor execution could increase complexity and compliance burdens for firms without delivering a clear competitiveness payoff.
Energy and digitisation show relatively high shares of initiatives underway, while critical raw minerals faces a larger backlog of unimplemented actions.
